services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every tree, every stump
services_section.subheading: Complete removal and cleanup in hours, not days

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Dead, dangerous, or unwanted trees cleared safely. Large oaks to backyard hazards — we handle it all.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Complete stump removal and cleanup. Your yard left ready for new landscaping or grass.

services.title: Tree Trimming
services.description: Professional pruning for health and safety. Overhanging branches and crowded canopies shaped right.

services.title: Storm Cleanup
services.description: Emergency tree damage cleared quickly. Fallen trees and broken limbs removed and hauled away.

about.heading: Huntsville tree crew
about.body: We're the team your neighbors already trust. One call gets you honest pricing and professional cleanup — every time.

reviews.name: Sawyer H.
reviews.text: Great service, very friendly. Neighbors were getting work done and we asked them to look at our trees. Great price and absolutely delivered.

reviews.name: 5 G.
reviews.text: John, Diego, and Diana did tremendous work. Close to 20 stumps and a large dead oak — everything removed and cleaned up in just a few hours.

reviews.name: Seth H.
reviews.text: Diego and crew trimmed a really tall tree hanging over my house. Great work for a good price and cleaned up after themselves.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Professional tree service throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready to clear that tree?
cta.body: Free estimates on all tree work. Same crew that's earned 5 stars from your neighbors.
